# Tactile

> A modern, context-aware keyboard shortcut engine for the web. Layout-aware matching (event.key + event.code, never keyCode), VS Code-style `when` expressions, first-class collision detection, runtime recording, and platform-aware label formatting. A framework-agnostic core (@tactile-js/core) with a thin React adapter (@tactile-js/react).

## Docs
- [Introduction](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/getting-started/introduction/)
- [Installation](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/getting-started/installation/)
- [Quick start](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/getting-started/quick-start/)
- [Match modes (layout-aware)](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/matching/)
- [Context & when expressions](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/when-expressions/)
- [Collision detection](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/collisions/)
- [React hooks](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/react/overview/)

## Source
- [GitHub](https://github.com/tactile-js/tactile)
- [npm: @tactile-js/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tactile-js/core)
- [npm: @tactile-js/react](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tactile-js/react)
